Rough expectations to set:
- Single long session. Expect to burn context — this is a Deep audit on 1M-ctx Opus, so it fits, but don't pile other work on top.
- 4 Codex calls at gpt-5.4 xhigh is the cost floor (not cheap). Retries inside a phase are cheap; Codex retries are not, hence the hard-cap.
- Because it's read-only and no git ops, no worktree isolation needed — safe to run in-place on `pkp/20260423-harden-prototype`.
